title: The Dove Of Peace
content:
Here's to the Dove of Peace!
    May she find a mate some day,
    And may her tribe increase
    As fast as she can lay!


    With cooing doves galore
    Then may the sky be dark
    Until the Dogs of War
    Can't see each other bark!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "The Dove Of Peace", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
